name: my-little-game-studio
description: Lightweight Unity indie game studio workflow for Codex. Use MLGS to route game development requests through MyLittleGameStudio agents and commands.

interface.longDescription: A lightweight AI game studio workflow for Unity indie projects. It routes requests through Producer, Creative Director, Game Designer, Unity Architect, Gameplay Developer, UI/UX Developer, Technical Artist, and QA Lead without repeated setup prompts.
defaultPrompt: MLGS status for my Unity project
